de.uka.ilkd.key.smt

Class FieldQuery

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.AbstractQuery
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.FieldQuery
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Query

    class FieldQuery
extends AbstractQuery
    Query for the value of a named field of an object in a heap.
    Author:
    mihai
